title: Plasticity Manifest
description: Configuration file for the NeuroPlasticity Self-Reinforced Testing (SRT) Framework

name.description: The name of the project or module being evaluated.

task_prompt.description: The prompt or goal passed to the agent for execution.

agent_command.description: The exact command and arguments used to run the agent headlessly inside the sandbox.

engine.description: The container engine to use. Podman is preferred for rootless security.

base_image.description: The Docker/Podman base image to use. Should include a pinned digest (e.g., @sha256:...).

setup_script.description: Optional command/script to run before the agent to set up the environment.

project_mount.description: The Read-Only mount path for the host project. Defaults to /project.

scratch_mount.description: The Read-Write mount path for the ephemeral scratch directory. Defaults to /workspace.

target.description: The container path to mount to (e.g., /root/.config/opencode).

readonly.description: Whether the mount should be read-only. Defaults to true.

target_rules_file.description: The JSON file where the meta-optimizer will write generated rules overlays.

epochs.description: The maximum number of optimization loops to run before failing.

pass_threshold.description: The weighted score ratio required to stop the loop successfully.

provider.description: The LLM API provider. Defaults to 'github' to use Copilot Models API. Set to 'embedded' to use llama.cpp locally.

model_path.description: Optional local path to a .gguf file for the 'embedded' provider. If omitted, defaults to downloading a 4-bit Qwen model.

base_url.description: Custom base URL for the OpenAI-compatible completions endpoint.

api_key_env.description: Environment variable containing the API key (e.g., 'OPENAI_API_KEY').
